## 📋 Pull Request

### Section(s) Changed
<!-- e.g. s05 — Menu Cards, s07 — Full Menu -->
- [ ] s__ — 

### Type of Change
- [ ] `feat` — New content or feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `style` — Visual/styling change (no content change)
- [ ] `content` — Copy/text/price update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure (no visible change)
- [ ] `hotfix` — Urgent production fix

### Description
<!-- What changed and why? -->

### Files Changed
| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `staging/sXX-name.html` | Isolated section preview |
| `preview.html` | Full staging site — section marked DRAFT |
| `staging/STAGING.md` | Status updated |

### Checklist
- [ ] Tested in browser (Chrome, Safari)
- [ ] Mobile layout checked (resize to 375px)
- [ ] `preview.html` dev toolbar shows correct DRAFT status for changed section(s)
- [ ] `staging/STAGING.md` status table updated
- [ ] Commit messages follow convention (`feat(s05): description`)
- [ ] No changes to `index.html` — production changes only come through approve workflow
